title: Anger on the banks of the Musi
description: With the Telangana government ready to implement the Musi Riverfront Development Project in Hyderabad, residents along the river are facing possible displacement and uncertainty over compensation. The Moosa and Esi tributaries, once seasonal streams, now flow with sewage and industrial effluents, raising questions about ecological restoration. Swathi Vadlamudi speaks to citizens and environmentalists
